sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Barings Participation Investors declares $0.37 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Barings Participation Investors (NYSE:MPV) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on January 16, 2026, to shareholders of record on December 30, 2025. The company currently offers a substantial 7.46% dividend yield with annual payments totaling $1.48 per share. The dividend is expected to consist of net investment income, with final tax characteristics determined after the fiscal year-end.

feed.title: Blades-in turbine inspections at Quad Cities set new benchmark for Constellation
feed.summary: Constellation has set a new benchmark for turbine inspections at its Quad Cities boiling water reactor plants by implementing an innovative "blades-in" phased array ultrasonic testing (PAUT) method. This technique allows for thorough inspection of turbine blades without removal, significantly reducing outage time and costs while ensuring structural integrity. The successful application at Quad Cities-2 and other plants has already yielded substantial savings and industry recognition.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land stock hits 52-week low at $837.60 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $837.60, representing a 29.41% decrease over the past year and a 58% drop from its 52-week high. Despite impressive gross profit margins of 94.13% and strong financial health, the company faces challenges, with Q3 2025 earnings and revenue missing analyst expectations. KeyBanc initiated coverage with an Overweight rating and a $1,050 price target, highlighting TPL's significant land and royalty interests in Texas.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Dividend
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: MPWR) announced a fourth-quarter dividend of $1.56 per share of common stock. This dividend will be paid on January 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The announcement includes a safe harbor statement regarding forward-looking statements.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) to post full-year 2025 results, 2026 outlook on Jan. 27
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) announced it will release its full-year 2025 financial results and provide 2026 guidance on January 27, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, the company will host a teleconference with analysts and investors at 8:00 a.m. ET. The webcast and replay will be available on the Investor Relations page of UnitedHealth Group’s website.

feed.title: ServiceNow Agrees To Buy Veza To Govern AI Agent Permissions At Scale
feed.summary: ServiceNow announced its intent to acquire Veza for over $1 billion to enhance identity governance for AI agents at scale. This acquisition, following ServiceNow's $2.85 billion deal for Moveworks, aims to integrate Veza's identity security platform with ServiceNow's AI Control Tower to provide critical governance for non-human identities, especially as enterprise AI adoption accelerates. The move signals ServiceNow's strategy to bolster its competitive position in the rapidly evolving AI landscape, addressing challenges like context-dependent permissions and the growing attack surface created by AI agents.

feed.title: Power Metals signs cesium offtake with Albemarle, secures C$5 million
feed.summary: Power Metals Corp. has secured a cesium concentrate offtake agreement with Albemarle Corporation, which includes a prepayment of up to C$5 million. This deal supports Power Metals' 2026 production target at its Case Lake project, which contains an inferred cesium mineral resource of 13,000 tonnes at 2.4% cesium oxide. Albemarle, a major critical minerals producer, acquired the offtake rights to the project and appears well-positioned to support the investment given its healthy liquidity.

feed.title: Avista Corp director Widmann sells $285k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Avista Corp (NYSE:AVA) Director Janet D. Widmann sold 7,400 shares of common stock for approximately $285,875. This insider transaction occurred on December 12, 2025, at a price of $38.6318 per share. Following the sale, Widmann directly owns 19,246 shares of Avista Corp.

feed.title: HRL Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Hormel
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL) after the company's stock fell due to cuts in its forecast, price pressures, and a CFO departure. Investors who purchased Hormel securities and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the law firm to join a prospective class action for compensation. The firm highlights its track record in securities class actions and derivative litigation, having recovered hundreds of millions for investors.

feed.title: Barclays Raises PT for Franklin Resources (BEN) to $22.00, Maint
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Benjamin Budish has increased the price target for Franklin Resources (BEN) from $20.00 to $22.00, while maintaining an 'Underweight' rating. This adjustment reflects a 10% increase in the price target. Other analysts have recently offered varied ratings and price targets for BEN, and GuruFocus estimates a 'Hold' status and an upside for the stock based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Wells Fargo cutting 114 jobs at Arden-Arcade office. CEO expects more cuts.
feed.summary: Wells Fargo is cutting 114 jobs at its Arden-Arcade office in Sacramento as part of a nationwide staff reduction. The CEO expects further cuts, indicating a broader trend of financial giants shifting tactics as the market evolves. This layoff follows recent news of bank expansions and new branch locations in the local area.

feed.title: Transforming Not-for-Profit Financial Stewardship
feed.summary: This article details how a not-for-profit education provider overcame significant financial management challenges, including complex accounting and an impending merger, by partnering with CBIZ. CBIZ provided not only technical fixes like strengthening internal controls and reconciling accounts but also educated staff on financial concepts, ensuring a smoother merger and fostering a culture of financial understanding. The collaboration resulted in improved transparency, enhanced trust among stakeholders, and better positioning for the organization to achieve its mission.

feed.title: Lithium Royalty Corp. Congratulates Power Metals on Offtake Agreement with Albemarle; Power Metals Reaffirms 2026 Production Target
feed.summary: Lithium Royalty Corp. (LRC) congratulates Power Metals Corp. on its cesium concentrate offtake agreement with Albemarle Corporation, a leading global critical minerals producer. Albemarle's commitment of up to C$5 million in prepayment supports Power Metals' goal of achieving its stated 2026 production target for cesium from its Case Lake project, where LRC holds a 2.0% gross overriding royalty. The article highlights the strategic importance of cesium due to its scarcity and high-value applications, with current production primarily from only two mines globally.

feed.title: Coca-Cola names Henrique Braun CEO
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Co. has announced that Henrique Braun, currently executive vice president and COO, will become CEO effective March 31. He will succeed James Quincey, who has served for nine years and will transition to executive chairman. Braun has a long history with Coca-Cola, holding various leadership roles across different regions since 1996.

feed.title: BAWAG Group AG Announces Change in Major Holdings by BlackRock
feed.summary: BAWAG Group AG announced a change in its major holdings, with BlackRock, Inc. now holding 6.12% of the voting rights as of December 10, 2025, a slight decrease from the previous notification. This adjustment could affect the company's shareholder structure and corporate governance. An analyst currently rates BAWAG (DE:0B2) as a Buy with a price target of EUR146.00.

feed.title: FDA Grants Orphan Status to Amgen's (AMGN) Blinatumomab for Leukemia Treatment
feed.summary: Amgen’s blinatumomab has received orphan drug designation from the FDA for acute lymphoblastic leukemia, a significant step in facilitating its development. Despite this positive regulatory news and robust revenue growth, Amgen faces challenges with declining margins, significant insider selling, and is in the distress zone based on its Altman Z-Score. Investors should consider the growth potential against these financial risks.

feed.title: PNC gets approvals to acquire Colorado-based bank
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group has received regulatory approvals to acquire FirstBank, based in Colorado. The transaction is expected to close around January 5, 2026, expanding PNC's presence in the Rocky Mountain region and the Southwest. Full customer conversion for FirstBank members is anticipated in mid-2026.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target for PEG, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JP Morgan has maintained an "Overweight" rating for Public Service Enterprise (PEG) but lowered its price target by 8.33% from $96.00 to $88.00. This adjustment reflects the analyst's latest evaluation of PEG's market prospects. Despite the lowered target, the average target price from 17 analysts suggests a potential upside of 14.94% from the current price, and the average brokerage recommendation indicates an "Outperform" status.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target for Edison Intl (EIX) to $65 | EIX Stock News
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Aidan Kelly maintained a Neutral rating on Edison Intl (EIX) but lowered the price target from $67.00 to $65.00 on December 12, 2025. This adjustment reflects a negative percentage change of 2.99%. Despite this, the average one-year target price from 15 analysts is $66.39, implying an upside of 13.53% from the current price, and the consensus recommendation is "Outperform."

feed.title: Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Price Target Raised to C$199.00
feed.summary: CIBC has raised its price target for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) to C$199.00 from C$192.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 9.44% from the stock's previous close, despite the broader analyst consensus remaining a "Hold" with an average price target of C$182.00. The stock recently traded near its 12-month high of C$182.90, with a market capitalization of C$128.91 billion.

feed.title: Governor Announces Major Southwest Airlines Expansion In Austin
feed.summary: Governor Greg Abbott announced that Southwest Airlines will establish a new pilot and flight attendant crew base in Austin, creating 2,000 jobs by mid-2027. This expansion is supported by a $14 million Texas Enterprise Fund grant and includes a training facility and Command Center buildout. The new crew base will significantly boost Austin's economy with high-paying jobs averaging $180,000 annually.

feed.title: Victoria’s Secret Stock Soars: Opportunity or Risk?
feed.summary: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) stock has risen by 4.02% following a strong Q3 earnings report and an upward adjustment to its fiscal 2025 outlook. Analysts such as JPMorgan and UBS have raised price targets to $60, signaling optimism for the company's growth and recovery strategies. The article highlights the brand's financial recovery, modernization efforts, and strategic positioning as key drivers behind the increased investor interest and market surge.

feed.title: Key facts: Apollo Global Management joins $7.4B Air Lease buyout; Harris to sell 1M shares; in talks for TenneT stake
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management has been involved in several significant activities recently, including joining a $7.4 billion buyout of Air Lease Corp with Sumitomo Corp in September. Joshua J. Harris of Apollo Global Management filed a Form 144 to sell 1,000,000 shares of restricted securities on December 11, 2025. Additionally, Apollo is in talks with the German government to form a consortium for a majority stake in TenneT’s German power grid, having already agreed to buy 25.1%.

feed.title: Walmart confirms opening of two new stores in January 2026: these are the locations in California and Florida
feed.summary: Walmart is set to open two new stores in January 2026, located in Apollo Beach, Florida, and Eastvale, California, as part of its national expansion and modernization plan. The Eastvale store, a 170,000-square-foot hypermarket, will feature a gas station, full-service deli, butcher, pharmacy, and vision center, creating 300 direct jobs. These new locations exemplify Walmart's "Store of the Future" concept, aiming for a modern, sustainable, and accessible shopping experience.

feed.title: Tractor Supply to hold pet adoption event
feed.summary: Tractor Supply in Calimesa is hosting a "Home for the Holidays" pet adoption event on December 13th from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. The event will feature adoptable animals from Guardian Angel Rescue and Barc Adoption Center, pet photos with Santa, and an ornament craft. Additionally, for every bag of Purina Pro Plan purchased, an additional bag will be donated to the participating rescues.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment adds second date for Los Bukis at SoFi Stadium
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment has announced a second and final concert date for Los Bukis at SoFi Stadium due to high demand for their '¡Tuyos Por Siempre!' tour. This decision allows more fans to see the legendary band and reflects Live Nation's strategy of expanding concert schedules to meet audience demands, similar to its handling of tours for Khalid, Lauv, and Matt Rife.

feed.title: Key facts: Fitch Affirms Invesco's 'A' Rating; CEO Increases Shareholding
feed.summary: Fitch Ratings has affirmed Invesco Ltd.'s 'A' rating following a $500 million partial redemption of preferred stock, which will be financed through its credit facility. Separately, Invesco CEO Andrew Schlossberg increased his total holdings to 814,083 shares on December 12, 2025, after receiving a gift of 18,800 shares.

feed.title: Key facts: Global Payments Inc. Director Acquires 13,392 Shares; VP Files to Sell 2,016 Shares
feed.summary: Robert H. Baldwin Jr., a Director at Global Payments Inc. (GPN), purchased 13,392 shares for $1.1 million, increasing his stake to 45,911 shares. Simultaneously, David M. Sheffield, VP of Global Payments Inc., filed to sell 2,016 shares of restricted stock on December 11, 2025.

feed.title: Key facts: General Dynamics sees revenue growth; Citigroup rates Neutral
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) reported strong year-over-year revenue growth and increased backlogs across all segments, particularly in marine and technologies. Following this performance, Citigroup has initiated coverage on General Dynamics with a 'Neutral' rating.

feed.title: Cencora Makes Major Bet on Global Pharma Logistics With U.S.–Europe Expansion
feed.summary: Cencora is significantly expanding its third-party logistics network across the U.S. and Europe to meet the growing demand for specialized pharmaceutical distribution. The expansion includes acquiring NextPharma Logistics in Europe, constructing a new 500,000-square-foot facility in Texas, and quadrupling ultra-low and cryogenic storage capacity. These investments aim to enhance support for complex global programs, product launches, and cell and gene therapy products.

feed.title: Key facts: DexCom faces class action lawsuit; Citigroup raises price target
feed.summary: DexCom, Inc. is facing a class action lawsuit over allegations of false claims regarding its G6 and G7 glucose monitoring systems, citing reliability issues and health risks. Concurrently, Citigroup has raised its price target for DexCom shares to $77.00 from $75.00.

feed.title: PTA-PVR: BAWAG Group AG: Release according to article 135 section 2 BörseG
feed.summary: BAWAG Group AG has issued a release in accordance with article 135 section 2 BörseG, detailing a significant holding notification from BlackRock, Inc. BlackRock, Inc. crossed a threshold on December 10, 2025, reaching a total of 6.12% in voting rights attached to shares and through instruments in BAWAG Group AG. The notification provides a detailed breakdown of BlackRock's direct and indirect holdings, including financial instruments.

feed.title: Key facts: Bunge Global SA discloses financial obligation; extends securitization
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA (BG) has filed a Form 8-K disclosing a financial obligation. The company extended its trade receivables securitization program to December 15, 2026. This extension was formalized through the Twenty-Ninth Amendment to the Receivables Transfer Agreement.

feed.title: Key facts: Biogen to release tau drug data; Morgan Stanley raises target; Jefferies hints at Nasdaq 100 removal
feed.summary: Biogen plans to release new data next year on a tau-targeting drug for Alzheimer's. Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Biogen to $156.00 per share. Jefferies suggests Biogen might be removed from the Nasdaq 100 index due to its low market capitalization, with an announcement expected on Friday and effective December 22.

feed.title: Key facts: Analog Devices Executives Sell Shares; Roche Files Form 144
feed.summary: Vincent Roche, Chairman of Analog Devices Inc (ADI), filed a Form 144 to sell 10,000 shares within 90 days. Separately, Michael Sondel, VP of Analog Devices (ADI), sold 8,169 shares for approximately $2.3 million. Following this sale, Sondel's holdings decreased to 18,913 shares.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Eversource Energy (ES) Price Target to USD 71
feed.summary: JP Morgan has lowered its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $71 from $72, while maintaining an "Underweight" rating. This adjustment follows several other analyst rating changes and price target revisions for ES in the past month, reflecting varied perspectives on the company's future. The average target price from 15 analysts is $72.81, indicating a "Hold" status, with GuruFocus estimating a downside from the current price based on its GF Value.

feed.title: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight Rating for Consolidated Edison (ED) | ED Stock News
feed.summary: JP Morgan has reiterated its "Underweight" rating for Consolidated Edison (ED) and lowered its price target from $101.00 to $97.00. This follows a similar price target reduction by Barclays in November. Analysts' consensus suggests a "Hold" status for ED with an average price target of $104.14.

feed.title: Power Metals Reaches Cesium Concentrate Offtake Agreement With Albemarle
feed.summary: Power Metals Corp. has secured a significant commercial milestone by entering into a cesium concentrate offtake agreement with Albemarle Corporation, a leading critical-minerals company. This deal involves Albemarle prepaying up to CAD$5 Million for cesium oxide concentrate from Power Metals' Case Lake Project and acquiring existing offtake rights from Winsome Resources. The agreement is a non-dilutive funding source for Power Metals, bolstering the Case Lake Project's advancement towards a 2026 production target.

feed.title: Leidos Create Helps Women Return to STEM Roles in the UK
feed.summary: Leidos has partnered with Career Returners to launch Leidos Create in the UK, a program aimed at helping experienced STEM professionals, particularly women, return to skilled roles after extended career breaks. The initiative addresses the bias against career breaks in recruitment, providing support, training, and flexible working arrangements. The article highlights success stories of individuals like Kay Mercer and Ajay Sahota, who found new careers at Leidos through the program.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines to open crew base in Austin creating 2,000 jobs
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is opening a new crew base at Austin Bergstrom International Airport in March 2026, creating over 2,000 jobs. The airline, currently Austin's largest air carrier, plans to expand service from Austin with new routes and expects the base to reach full capacity by mid-2027. This expansion comes amidst mixed financial news for Southwest, including adjusted earnings expectations and a new partnership with German carrier Condor.

feed.title: Tractor Supply to hold holiday themed pet adoption event Saturday
feed.summary: Tractor Supply is hosting a holiday-themed pet adoption event on December 13th from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. at both Bakersfield locations. The event will feature pet photos with Santa, a holiday ornament craft, and a $25 Tractor Supply gift card for those who adopt a pet. For every bag of pet food purchased, Tractor Supply will donate a bag to Rescue Ranch Inc.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Stock (NYSE: SCHW) News, Forecasts & Analysis — November Asset Inflows, Forge Deal, and Crypto Plans (Dec. 12, 2025)
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) stock is in focus after the company reported strong November activity, including $40.4 billion in core net new assets and $11.83 trillion in client assets. The company also announced strategic moves like the Forge acquisition and plans to offer spot crypto trading in 2026. Analyst forecasts are broadly constructive, with an average one-year price target of $112.20, as the market looks towards Q4 earnings for further insights into asset growth, cash sorting, and integration plans.

feed.title: Geely Just Built the World's Largest Crash Lab--And It's Coming for Tesla's Safety Crown
feed.summary: Geely Auto Group has established the world's largest automotive safety testing center in Ningbo, a 4.5-hectare facility built at a cost of 2 billion yuan. This strategic move aims to address tightening regulatory scrutiny on EV safety globally, particularly amid concerns about cost-cutting in the industry. The facility features extensive crash simulation capabilities, advanced battery and powertrain safety evaluations, and will also focus on vehicle cybersecurity and software-driven safety.

feed.title: Travel in Style: Explore Upscale Hotels with Apple Hospitality REIT
feed.summary: Apple Hospitality REIT, Inc. (NYSE: APLE) has announced its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results will be released on February 23, 2026, after market close, with an earnings call on February 24, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET. The company, a major owner of upscale, rooms-focused hotels under Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt brands, manages 216 properties across 84 markets. This announcement provides crucial financial details for investors and highlights the REIT's strong market position and diverse portfolio, catering to various traveler needs.

feed.title: Drake State Community and Technical College Hosts Ribbon-Cutting for Leidos Advanced Training Complex
feed.summary: Drake State Community and Technical College celebrated the grand opening of its new 50,000-square-foot Leidos Advanced Training Complex with a ribbon-cutting ceremony. The facility, made possible by a $1.75 million donation from Leidos and a statewide bond issue, will provide advanced training in aerospace and manufacturing industries. It offers programs in precision machining, welding, additive manufacturing, and mechatronics, aiming to strengthen the regional workforce and support economic growth.

feed.title: Teradyne Robotics leaning into U.S. manufacturing reboot
feed.summary: Teradyne Robotics is opening a new 67,000-sq.-ft. U.S. headquarters in Wixom, Michigan, by late 2026 to support its Mobile Industrial Robots (MiR) and Universal Robots (UR) subsidiaries. This move aims to leverage the growing momentum for reshoring and a national robotics strategy, serving major customers like Amazon Robotics and contributing to the U.S. robotics landscape. Despite a challenging financial year and recent layoffs, Teradyne Robotics is making a significant investment in manufacturing, sales, and customer training, expecting to create over 200 jobs.

feed.title: Altria CEO Billy Gifford to retire in 2026, CFO Sal Mancuso named successor
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. announced that CEO Billy Gifford will retire in May 2026 after over 30 years with the company, to be succeeded by current CFO Salvatore “Sal” Mancuso. Heather Newman will take over as CFO. Gifford will serve as a consultant through the end of 2026, and Mancuso expressed a commitment to continuing the company's strategic direction.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Stock News Today: Price Action, S&P Upgrade, 2026 Forecasts, and What Analysts Are Watching (Dec. 12, 2025)
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) stock experienced volatility, falling 1.6% on December 12, 2025, after an S&P credit rating upgrade to investment grade (BBB-) and amidst discussions around its role in meeting AI-driven power demand. The company's 2026 outlook includes significant EBITDA growth, substantial share repurchases, and strategic investments in natural gas and long-term nuclear contracts. Analysts maintain a "Buy" consensus despite valuation concerns and policy risks, with price targets ranging up to $250.

feed.title: PPL (NYSE:PPL) Given New $40.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has set a new $40.00 price target for PPL (NYSE:PPL), reiterating an "overweight" rating and suggesting a roughly 19.64% upside. This adjustment comes despite PPL beating its recent quarterly EPS estimates. The consensus analyst rating for PPL remains a "Buy" with an average price target of $40.58.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) Given New $41.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) from $43.00 to $41.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating with a potential upside of 9.46%. Other analysts have assigned varied ratings and price targets, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $41.59 for CenterPoint Energy. The company recently reported Q3 earnings of $0.50 per share, exceeding estimates, but missed revenue expectations.
